phrases.intent_en: Order a dozen oysters and a glass of white wine
phrases.text_local: Une douzaine d'huîtres et un verre de vin blanc, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: oon doo-ZEN dwee-TREH ay un VEHR deh van BLAN seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Café de Turin has been serving fresh seafood on Place Garibaldi since 1908 — one of Nice's most iconic brasseries.

responses.english: Very well. A platter is coming.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the shellfish is delivered fresh that morning
phrases.text_local: Les coquillages sont-ils livrés frais ce matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay ko-kee-YAZH son-TEEL lee-VRAY FREH seh mah-TAN
phrases.cultural_note: Freshness is the house pride at Café de Turin. Expect oysters from Arcachon or Normandy, sea urchins in season.

responses.phonetic: wee too lay ZHOOR doo mar-SHAY
responses.local: Oui, tous les jours du marché.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to eat sea urchins properly
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous m'expliquer comment déguster les oursins ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo mek-splee-KAY kuh-MAN day-gyoo-STAY lay zoor-SAN
phrases.cultural_note: Sea urchins (oursins) are a Niçois delicacy — eaten fresh with a squeeze of lemon and a small spoon.

responses.english: With the small spoon, like this.
responses.phonetic: ah-VEK lah puh-TEET kwee-YAIR kohm SAH
responses.local: Avec la petite cuillère, comme ça.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a table on the outdoor terrace
phrases.text_local: Auriez-vous une table en terrasse, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oh-RYAY voo oon TAB-leh an teh-RAS seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The terrace facing Place Garibaldi is a prime spot for people-watching while enjoying plateaux de fruits de mer.

responses.phonetic: wee eel ee ah duh lah PLAHSS duh-OR
responses.local: Oui, il y a de la place dehors.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the seafood platter for two
phrases.text_local: Nous prendrions le plateau de fruits de mer pour deux, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: noo pran-DRYON leh plah-TOH deh frwee deh MEHR poor duh seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The grande plateau de fruits de mer is an impressive tower of oysters, langoustines, crab and clams — allow time to enjoy it.

responses.english: For two, it is the large platter.
responses.phonetic: poor DUH say luh GRAHN plah-TOH
responses.local: Pour deux, c'est le grand plateau.

vocabulary.word_local: le plateau de fruits de mer
vocabulary.pronunciation: leh plah-TOH deh frwee deh MEHR
